Underconstrained output signal in IsZero.Root Cause: Wrong Translation of Logic into Constraints
Underconstrained output signal in IsZero.Short Description of the Vulnerability: The output signal is assigned with <-- but never constrained with ===, allowing a malicious prover to set it to an arbitrary value.
Underconstrained output signal in IsZero.Proposed Mitigation: Add an equality constraint out === 1 - in * inv to bind the output signal.
